content: Curator pitch email anatomy: Subject line = artist name + track title + genre under 50 chars (e.g. 'New indie-pop single from [Artist Name]'). Body: para 1 = specific compliment about the playlist + track info (title, release date, genre) + why it fits (2-3 sentences); para 2 = one relevant achievement (placements, blog features, streaming milestones) + one unique element about the track. Include: streaming link and press photo as links not attachments. Use private pre-release link (SoundCloud or Dropbox). Exclude: full biography, generic templates, embedded attachments. Timing: send Tue-Thu, 2-4 weeks before release. Follow up once at 10 days. Key stat: 48% of submissions have zero personalization — personalization is the single biggest differentiator. Keep total length under 150 words.
